'''Unut Poll''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] collaborator during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]], Unut Poll owned the [[Spaceport Speeders/Legends|Spaceport Speeders]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], a major port city on the desert world [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Having fled from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] earlier in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]], Poll's [[Youngling/Legends|children]] and wife had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the fighting before he arrived on Tatooine. During his time in Mos Eisley, Poll sheltered homeless Arcona in secret; helping them to find new identities free from Imperial scrutiny.<ref name="GG7" />

A frequent patron of [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]], Poll was unlike others of his [[Species/Legends|species]], as he did not fall to the temptation of [[Salt/Legends|salt]]. Employing a [[Vuvrian/Legends|Vuvrian]] named [[Wioslea/Legends|Wioslea]], Poll was angered by the fact that the woman had bought a [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|young]] [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer's]] old [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] for 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="GG7" />
